name: Kaname Kogyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kaname Kogyo Co.,Ltd. provides waste management services. It engages in the collection, transportation, and disposal of general and industrial waste; and collection and transportation of used papers, bottles, cans, confidential documents, medical wastes, Styrofoams, etc. In addition, it is involved in the recycling activities; sale of recycled resources; administrative contract activities; and processing of administrative consigned resources. As of March 31, 2020, the company had 315 units of collection and transportation vehicles. Kaname Kogyo Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
